pages.text: AE2 has 6 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:ae2_core_t1, kubejs:ae2_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:ae2_core_t1$() gates: ae2:inscriber, ae2:charger, ae2:energy_acceptor, ae2:fluix_glass_cable
$(li)$(item)kubejs:ae2_core_t2$() gates: ae2:controller, ae2:annihilation_core, ae2:formation_core, ae2:cell_component_1k
$(li)$(item)kubejs:ae2_core_t3$() gates: ae2:molecular_assembler, ae2:pattern_provider, ae2:crafting_unit, ae2:cell_component_4k
$(li)$(item)kubejs:ae2_core_t4$() gates: ae2:wireless_receiver, ae2:wireless_access_point, ae2:cell_component_16k
$(li)$(item)kubejs:ae2_core_t5$() gates: ae2:quantum_link, ae2:quantum_ring, ae2:spatial_io_port
$(li)$(item)kubejs:ae2_core_t6$() gates: ae2:item_storage_cell_256k, ae2:256k_crafting_storage
